era: Hip-Hop. E=7 -- the DUO entry. The trifecta completes (160 Lewis, 180 Macklemore, 181 duo). Back-to-back #1 hits independently. Quadrant III opens. v1.49.322.

location.formative: Seattle hip-hop scene. Macklemore LLC. Independent infrastructure. Social media era.
location.career: Macklemore & Ryan Lewis. Macklemore LLC (independent). 2008-2017 peak era.

members.name: Macklemore
members.note: Degree 180 (solo). Beacon Hill. The voice and storytelling.

members.name: Ryan Lewis
members.note: Degree 160 (solo). Orchestral maximalism. Horns, strings, video direction.

associated_musicians.name: Sir Mix-a-Lot
associated_musicians.relationship: Predecessor. Degree 179. Two generations of Seattle independent hip-hop at #1. Nastymix to LLC.

associated_musicians.name: Kid Sensation
associated_musicians.relationship: Nastymix lineage. Degree 177. The earlier generation of Seattle hip-hop.

associated_musicians.name: Blue Scholars
associated_musicians.relationship: Conscious Seattle hip-hop. Degree 156. Social engagement. Meaning.

theory_nodes.concept: Duo exceeds parts -- Macklemore solo E=6, Lewis solo E=6, together E=7. The collaborative chemistry produced unprecedented independent success. The synergy IS the extra energy level.
examples: Two #1 hits independently. No other indie act achieved this.
theory_nodes.description: Duo exceeds parts. E=6 + E=6 = E=7. Collaborative synergy.

theory_nodes.concept: The trifecta (160-180-181) -- three entries across 21 degrees documenting one creative partnership from every angle: producer, artist, duo. The most comprehensive artist documentation in the engine.
theory_nodes.description: Three entries. One partnership. Every angle documented.

genealogy.relationship: The DUO at 181 completes the trifecta.

theory_nodes.concept: Quadrant III opens -- degree 181 is the first entry of the second half. The engine crosses the midpoint. A collaboration opens the second half, fitting as the engine now builds on first-half foundations.
examples: Degree 181: first degree past the midpoint.
A DUO entry opens the second half.
theory_nodes.description: Quadrant III opens. The second half begins.

genealogy.relationship: 181 opens Q3. The second half begins with a collaboration.

theory_nodes.concept: E=7 trio begins (181-183) -- three consecutive E=7 entries. Macklemore & Ryan Lewis (181), Criminal Nation (182), Raz Simone (183). The most intense energy concentration in the engine.
theory_nodes.description: E=7 trio. Three consecutive maximum energy entries.

genealogy.relationship: 181-183 forms the longest consecutive E=7 streak.

cross_references.relationship: TRIFECTA! Producer entry. Sonic architect. Horns, strings, maximalist production. Video direction.
TRIFECTA! Artist entry. HALFWAY MARK. The voice, the storytelling, Beacon Hill.
LINEAGE! Two generations of Seattle independent hip-hop at #1. Nastymix (physical) to LLC (digital).
E=7 STREAK! Three consecutive E=7 (181-183). Maximum energy concentration.
CONSCIOUS HIP-HOP! 'Same Love' social advocacy + Blue Scholars engagement. Seattle hip-hop with meaning.
